title: Flare Guns
description: Shoot flares for illumination or communication! Everyone on a server can see the shining lights you launch into the sky
body:
Craft some Flare Shells and fill them with a mix of dye. Hold the resulting Flare in your offhand to load them into your Flare Gun.

---

Signalling Flares can be seen regardless of distance. Let your friends know where you are in an immersive way!
![A red flare is launched far in the distance from a mountaintop](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2e3359ba23b96bae80be3e1975af711d796dcfae.gif)
Illumination Flares are great for lighting up a cave, and emit coloured lights!
![Several flares of different colours, showing off bloom and coloured lights](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4817d753558eff645083a228fb837db75cb3fd58_0.webp)
![A pitch black cave momentarily lit up by a flare shot down it](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b7f752e3b859e789b450567638f19c6fa5e22140.gif)
